description:
Consumer report from trip-planner project. HIGH.

Problem: Multiple component type definitions have drifted from actual CEM:

1. HxSkeletonAttributes (helix.d.ts lines 318-324):
   - Types define: shape?, effect?
   - Actual CEM: variant, width, height, animated, loaded

2. HxSpinnerAttributes (helix.d.ts line 906):
   - Types allow HxVariant (success, warning, etc.)
   - Actual CEM only accepts: default, primary, inverted

3. 20+ event handlers declared in types but not in CEM, and vice versa:
   - Missing from types: onhx-after-close, onhx-copy, onhx-load, onhx-page-change, onhx-tree-item-select
   - Dead in types: onhx-search (no component emits this)

Fix: Full audit of helix.d.ts against current CEM. Ideally automate generation.

Acceptance criteria:
- All component attribute types match CEM exactly
- All event handler types match CEM events
- No dead/phantom type definitions
- CI check validates types vs CEM on release
title: fix: helix.d.ts HxSkeletonAttributes and HxSpinnerAttributes property drift
